'''''Ludwick''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Buckeye]] and a part of a task force led by [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. In the [[Battle on the Frontier]], the ''Ludwick'' attacked and destroyed a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] outpost belonging to the [[Pakuuni Pirates]] in order to establish a new space installation called [[NL-1]]. The frigate also watched over [[Space station/Legends|station]] NL-1 while the [[Stalwart (Victory-class)|''Stalwart'']] was arranging for additional support [[Starship/Legends|starships]] personnel.
